name: I'm at the edge of a BOTTOMLESS hole
description: I'm at the edge of a BOTTOMLESS hole
hints: There is a hole here and an advertisement. The hole might not be truly bottomless.
GO HOLE to descend to a ledge just below the rim. There is something useful down there.
GO HOLE to reach a ledge (room 30) where the flint & steel are. Do NOT go further down from there or you die!
GO HOLE then GET FLINT on the ledge. Do NOT go DOWN from the ledge - that leads to Hell (death). Go NORTH for the lake, WEST for the swamp.
notes: Edge of the bottomless hole. GO HOLE leads to a ledge (room 30) with the flint & steel. The advertisement is a Scott Adams meta-reference. NORTH goes to the lake (room 10), WEST to the swamp (room 1).
